chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-689 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 17.10.2022. None present for the applicant. Mr. Aijaz Hussain Jatoi advocate alongwith complainant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. ASI Sajid Ali Abbasi P.S. Kotri. ORDER MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- Applicant and his counsel are called absent without intimation. I have perused FIR with the assistance of learned APG. It appears that the complainant sold two shops situated at Bihar Stop Kotri against Rs.46 lacs each to applicant against which he gave him a cheque of Rs.90 lacs which however on presentation was dishonored, hence, this FIR. Learned APG submits that there is prima facie evidence in shape of dishonored cheque and 161 CrPC statements of witnesses supporting the case. In presence of such prima facie evidence, no case for extra ordinary pre-arrest bail is made out in favor of the applicant, and there appears to be no malafide on the part of complainant to falsely implicate him. Accordingly, the bail application is dismissed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to him vide order dated 28.06.2022 is hereby recalled. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Irfan Ali
